service.provider: City of Apache Junction GIS Division

metadata.fixtureVerificationSource: City of Apache Junction GIS Data Package dated 2026-05-05
metadata.testAddress: 300 E Superstition Blvd, Apache Junction, AZ 85119

notes: This configuration resolves City of Apache Junction zoning by intersecting runtime coordinates with Layer 0 of the City's official public ZoningDistricts map service.
ZoningLabel is the published zoning code and ZoningDescription is the corresponding published district description.
The City Hall metadata fixture was independently intersected against the City's official GIS Data Package dated May 5, 2026 and resolves to PI, Public and Institutional.
The transport configuration uses POST, explicit headers, longer timeouts, and bounded retries because the City GIS endpoint has demonstrated intermittent 502 responses.
Overlay, Ordinance, and Notes are retained when published because they may identify additional requirements or governing actions.
The City states that its GIS content is informational, is compiled from multiple sources, is generally updated monthly without guarantee, and should be independently verified.
The configuration covers the incorporated City of Apache Junction in both Maricopa and Pinal counties; parcel jurisdiction controls selection.

A resolved zoning result supports permit research but does not replace review of applicable ordinances, planned-development documents, overlays, stipulations, or confirmation by the City of Apache Junction.
